critical_code_review_comments: seed_stage1_full.py correctly generates 12 units with unique colors and themes
Each unit has 4 lessons with 10-step activity flow
Vocabulary words include image_emoji field (e.g., cow=🐄, horse=🐴, sheep=🐑)
Grammar games properly combine 3 types: error_hunter, word_order, fill_blank
Exit tickets have 4 questions per lesson with appropriate vocabulary
